name: @efro/shopify-app
description: EFRO Shopify App — OAuth, Product Sync, GDPR, Admin UI

scripts.test:product-sync-pagination: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const s=fs.readFileSync('server.js','utf8');const a=s.indexOf('async function syncProducts');const b=s.indexOf('app.get',a);const fn=s.slice(a,b>0?b:a+1800);const m={hasSyncProducts:a>=0,startsWithMaxRestLimit:fn.includes('products.json?limit=250'),usesWhileUrl:fn.includes('while (url)')||fn.includes('while(url)'),readsLinkHeader:fn.includes('headers.get(\"Link\")')||fn.includes(\"headers.get('Link')\"),parsesRelNext:fn.includes('rel=\\\"next\\\"')||fn.includes(\"rel='next'\"),advancesUrlFromNextMatch:fn.includes('url = nextMatch ? nextMatch[1] : null'),accumulatesAllProducts:fn.includes('allProducts = allProducts.concat(data.products || [])'),postsAllProducts:fn.includes('products: allProducts')};console.log('[shopify-product-sync-pagination]',JSON.stringify(m,null,2));for(const [k,v] of Object.entries(m)){if(!v){console.error('FAIL',k);process.exit(1)}}"
